top_signals.title: Shares in Uber-backed Lime jump after it raised $167mn in IPO
top_signals.summary: Bike and scooter group’s shares were initially priced at $25 in deal underwritten by Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Jefferies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Agents of change − speech by Sarah Breeden
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
top_signals.summary: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump’s $1.4 Billion Haul Makes Him Biggest US Crypto Moneymaker
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump, who reversed his early skepticism of crypto to become one of the industry’s biggest boosters, reported more crypto-related income last year than any publicly traded US digital-asset company earned.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Wayve hands London private market ‘major boost’ with $85m share sale
top_signals.summary: Wayve has handed London’s fledgling private markets platform a major boost after unveiling an $85m (£63m) employee share sale. In what has been labelled a “major boost” for the City’s efforts to keep tech firms on home soil, the British autonomous driving unicorn will use the London Stock Exchange’s new Private Intermittent Securities and Capital [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Extreme Weather Will Upend U.S.-China Competition
top_signals.summary: The cost of falling behind on climate adaptation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s FX chief flags contact with U.S., intervention impact
top_signals.summary: Mimura's remarks indicate that he continues to see intervention as a useful tool to stem excessive moves in the currency market.
